metadata.description: Modular research-agent skills: remote GPU jobs, adversarial claim verification. Extracted from a working autonomous-research lab.

plugins.name: gpu-job
plugins.description: Give your coding agent GPU powers: disposable cloud GPU pods with your environment restored, detached job execution, artifact persistence, verified teardown (never bill an idle GPU). Backend: RunPod.

plugins.name: verify-claims
plugins.description: Adversarial fact-checking of load-bearing claims against primary records by an independent model (read-only sandboxed). Catches the confidently-wrong-number class before money or conclusions move.
